penalties.description: The marked circle was not fully freed from the gauze by the maximum time limit.

reasoning: The video shows clear cutting activity following the marked circle with good instrument control. However, the task appears to timeout at 300 seconds without the circle being completely freed from the gauze. The final frames show the circle still partially attached. Since the maximum time was reached without completion, this results in an incomplete task with zero score.
